tasks.label: Dev — Start (port 80)
tasks.detail: Full dev stack in Docker. Web → http://localhost (port 80) · API direct → http://localhost:8000 · DB → localhost:5432 · Grafana → http://localhost:3000

tasks.label: Dev — Stop
tasks.detail: Stop and remove all dev containers (volumes preserved).

tasks.label: Dev — Rebuild backend only
tasks.detail: Rebuild and restart only the Go backend container.

tasks.label: Dev — Rebuild frontend only
tasks.detail: Rebuild and restart only the nginx frontend container.

tasks.label: Dev — Reset DB volume (DESTRUCTIVE)
tasks.command: docker compose --env-file infra/.env.dev down && docker volume rm garden-planner-db-data && docker compose --env-file infra/.env.dev up --build
tasks.detail: ⚠ Deletes all DB data then restarts the full stack with a clean database.
